zh.lifeSummary: 當Oluf Bjornsen Bjorn於大約1320年出生在丹麥斯文德波格薩林斯萬寧斯斯加德時，他的父親Bjorn Olufsen Bjorn31歲，母親Mrs. Bjorn Bjorn32歲。他於大約1339年與Hille Moltke Cortsdatter結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1360年被列為ridder - ritter。他去世於1381年在他的家鄉享年62歲，埋葬在丹麥斯托斯特洛姆ae斯特維德賀盧福霍爾姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Oluf Bjornsen Bjorn于大约1320年出生在丹麦斯文德波格薩林斯萬寧斯斯加德时，他的父亲Bjorn Olufsen Bjorn31岁，母亲Mrs. Bjorn Bjorn32岁。他于大约1339年与Hille Moltke Cortsdatter结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1360年被列为ridder - ritter。他去世于1381年在他的家乡享年62岁，埋葬在丹麦斯托斯特洛姆ae斯特維德賀盧福霍爾姆。

nameMeanings.name: Bjorn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Lars, Walfrid.

Danish and Norwegian (Bjørn); Swedish (Björn): from a personal name and nickname meaning ‘bear’ (Old Norse bjǫrn). The Norwegian name is often a shortened form of any of various habitational names from any of the places called with this word. In Swedish it is ornamental in some cases. Compare Ursin .

variants.name: Bjornstad
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Bjorn, Carsten, Erik, Fredrik, Peer.
Norwegian (Bjørnstad): habitational name from a farm named as ‘Bjørn's farm’ (see Bjorn ), of which there are many examples, especially in southeastern Norway.

variants.name: Ursin
meanings: Scandinavian (mainly Norwegian): Latinized (humanistic) form of a surname like Danish and Norwegian Bjørn (see Bjorn ) and Bjørnsen (see Bjornsen ), from Latin ursus ‘bear’.
French: variant, influenced by the Latin name Ursus, of Oursin, itself a derivative of Ours ‘bear’.

variants.name: Bjornson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Bjorn, Erik, Sig, Arni, Berger, Birgit, Lars, Ove, Selmer, Thor.
Americanized form of Swedish Björnsson or its rare variant Björnson: patronymic from the personal name Björn (see Bjorn ).
Americanized form of Norwegian Bjørnsen, a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Bjornsen
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Steinar, Bjorn, Knut.  German Fritz, Hans.
Danish and Norwegian (Bjørnsen): patronymic from the personal name Bjørn (see Bjorn ). Compare Ursin .

nameMeanings.name: Oluf
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from an Old Norse personal name composed of the elements anu ‘ancestor’ + leifr ‘heir, descendant’. St Olaf , King of Norway ( 995–1030 ), aided the spread of Christianity in his kingdom. The name was introduced to Britain before the Norman Conquest, but modern use as a given name in the English-speaking world originated in America, where it was taken by recent Scandinavian immigrants.

variants.name: Olai
meanings: from an Old Norse personal name composed of the elements anu ‘ancestor’ + leifr ‘heir, descendant’. St Olaf , King of Norway ( 995–1030 ), aided the spread of Christianity in his kingdom. The name was introduced to Britain before the Norman Conquest, but modern use as a given name in the English-speaking world originated in America, where it was taken by recent Scandinavian immigrants.

variants.name: Ola
meanings: variant of   Olaf  , also widely used in southwest Sweden.

nameMeanings.name: Bjornsen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Steinar, Bjorn, Knut.  German Fritz, Hans.
Danish and Norwegian (Bjørnsen): patronymic from the personal name Bjørn (see Bjorn ). Compare Ursin .

variants.name: Bjorn
meanings: from an Old Norse byname meaning ‘bear’. It is also a short form of compound names such as   Arnbjörn   and   Torbjörn .

en.lifeSummary: When Oluf Bjornsen Bjorn was born about 1320, in Stensgård, Svanninge, Sallinge, Svendborg, Denmark, his father, Bjorn Olufsen Bjorn, was 31 and his mother, Mrs. Bjorn Bjorn, was 32. He married Hille Moltke Cortsdatter about 1339. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. In 1360, at the age of 41, his occupation is listed as ridder - ritter. He died in 1381, in his hometown, at the age of 62, and was buried in Herlufsholm, Næstved, Storstrøm, Denmark.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Oluf Bjornsen Bjorn est né environ 1320, à Stensgård, Svanninge, Sallinge, Svendborg, Danemark, son père, Bjorn Olufsen Bjorn, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Bjorn Bjorn, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Hille Moltke Cortsdatter environ 1339. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. En 1360, à l’âge de 41 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est ridder - ritter. Il est décédé en 1381, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Herlufsholm, Næstved, Storstrøm, Danemark.

de.lifeSummary: Als Oluf Bjornsen Bjorn um 1320 in Stensgård, Svanninge, Sallinge, Svendborg, Dänemark geboren wurde, war sein Vater Bjorn Olufsen Bjorn 31 und seine Mutter Mrs. Bjorn Bjorn 32. Er hat um 1339 Hille Moltke Cortsdatter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1360, als er 41 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als ridder - ritter aufgeführt. Er starb 1381 im Alter von 62 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Herlufsholm, Næstved, Storstrøm, Dänemark begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Oluf Bjornsen Bjorn è nato il circa 1320 nel Stensgård, Svanninge, Sallinge, Svendborg, Danimarca, il suo padre, Bjorn Olufsen Bjorn, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Bjorn Bjorn, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Hille Moltke Cortsdatter circa 1339. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Nel 1360, all'età di 41 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come ridder - ritter. Morì nel 1381, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Herlufsholm, Næstved, Storstrøm, Danimarca.

ja.lifeSummary: Oluf Bjornsen Bjornが約1320年にデンマークスベンドボルグサリンッジスヴァニンッジステンスグaルドで生まれた時，父Bjorn Olufsen Bjornは31歳，母Mrs. Bjorn Bjornは32歳であった。約1339年にHille Moltke Cortsdatterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。1360年，41歳の時，職業はridder - ritterと記録されている。彼は1381年に故郷で62歳で死去し，デンマークストルストルoムンaeストベドハールフショルムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Oluf Bjornsen Bjorn(이)가 대략 1320년 덴마크 스븐드볼그 샐링 스반잉 스텐스그a르드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Bjorn Olufsen Bjorn(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Bjorn Bjorn(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 1339년 Hille Moltke Cortsdatter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1360년, 41세의 나이로 그의 직업은 ridder - ritter이었다. 그는 1381년 그의 고향에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 덴마크 스토르스트o ae스트브드 허루프쇼름에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Oluf Bjornsen Bjorn nasceu aproximadamente 1320, em Stensgård, Svanninge, Sallinge, Svendborg, Dinamarca, seu pai, Bjorn Olufsen Bjorn, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Bjorn Bjorn, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Hille Moltke Cortsdatter aproximadamente 1339. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Em 1360, com 41 anos, sua profissão aparece como ridder - ritter. Ele faleceu em 1381, em sua cidade natal, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Herlufsholm, Næstved, Storstrøm, Dinamarca.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Oluf Bjornsen Bjorn родился около 1320 г. в местности стенсгaрд, сваннинг, саллинг, свендборг, Дания, его отцу по имени Bjorn Olufsen Bjorn было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Bjorn Bjorn, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Hille Moltke Cortsdatter около 1339 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. В 1360 году, в возрасте 41 год,  он работал по профессии ridder - ritter. Он умер в 1381 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности хирлуфшолм, нaeствед, сторстрoм, Дания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Oluf Bjornsen Bjorn nació aproximadamente 1320, en Stensgård, Svanninge, Sallinge, Svendborg, Dinamarca, su papá, Bjorn Olufsen Bjorn, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Mrs. Bjorn Bjorn, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Hille Moltke Cortsdatter aproximadamente 1339. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. En 1360, a la edad de 41 años, su ocupación registrada era ridder - ritter. Murió en 1381, en su pueblo, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Herlufsholm, Næstved, Storstrøm, Dinamarca.
